Publish

Add this snippet to your website to make the chatbot live.
Script embed
iFrame
React
WordPress
⧉ Copy
<script src="https://cdn.chatbotbuilder.app/widget.js"></script> <script> ChatbotBuilder.init({ chatbotId: "cb_acme_7f29ac3e", position: "bottom-right" }); </script>
Paste before the closing </body> tag on every page where the chatbot should appear.
Installation steps
1
Copy the snippet
Or choose iFrame, React, or WordPress from the tabs.
2
Paste into your site
Works with any site builder, CMS, or framework.
3
Reload your page
Changes to the chatbot publish instantly — no redeploy needed.
